# Introduction to Grammar of Graphics {background-color="#427711"}

## A framework for data visualization {.smaller}

Introduced by Leland Wilkinson ([The Grammar of Graphics](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/0-387-28695-0 "Access provided by U. Bordeaux"), 2005).

Graphics can be built up from a set of components:

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
-   [Data]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: the dataset to be visualized
-   [Variables]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: mapping of objects to values
-   [Algebra]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: operations to combine variables and specify dimensions
-   [Scales]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: represent variables on measured dimensions
-   [Statistics]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: functions to change the appearance and representation
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
-   [Geometry]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: creation of geometric graphs from variables
-   [Coordinates]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: mapping to coordinate systems
-   [Aesthetics]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: sensory attributes
-   [Facets]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: subplots based on subsets of data
-   [Guides]{.fg style="--col: #427711"}: legends and axes to explain the graph
:::
:::::

## Adapted to R in the `ggplot2` package 

![](resources/overview_graphic-1.png)

## Example: Data {.smaller}


::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

head(mpg)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 6 × 11
  manufacturer model displ  year   cyl trans      drv     cty   hwy fl    class 
  <chr>        <chr> <dbl> <int> <int> <chr>      <chr> <int> <int> <chr> <chr> 
1 audi         a4      1.8  1999     4 auto(l5)   f        18    29 p     compa…
2 audi         a4      1.8  1999     4 manual(m5) f        21    29 p     compa…
3 audi         a4      2    2008     4 manual(m6) f        20    31 p     compa…
4 audi         a4      2    2008     4 auto(av)   f        21    30 p     compa…
5 audi         a4      2.8  1999     6 auto(l5)   f        16    26 p     compa…
6 audi         a4      2.8  1999     6 manual(m5) f        18    26 p     compa…
```


:::
:::

## Example: Data {auto-animate=TRUE}


::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(mpg)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::


## Example: Mapping {auto-animate=TRUE}


::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(x = displ, y = hwy)
)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-3-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::


## Example: Layers {auto-animate=TRUE}

::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(
    x = cty,
    y = hwy
  )
) +
  geom_point()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::




## Example: Scales {auto-animate=TRUE}

::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(
    x = displ,
    y = hwy,
    colour = class
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d()
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::


## Example: Facets {auto-animate=TRUE}

::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(
    x = displ,
    y = hwy,
    colour = class
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  facet_grid(class ~ year)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::


## Example: Coordinates {auto-animate=TRUE}

::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(
    x = displ,
    y = hwy,
    colour = class
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  facet_grid(class ~ year) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, 8),
    ylim = c(10, 50)
  )
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::


## Example: Theme {auto-animate=TRUE}

::: {.cell output-location='column'}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(
  mpg,
  mapping = aes(
    x = displ,
    y = hwy,
    colour = class
  )
) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  facet_grid(class ~ year) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, 8),
    ylim = c(10, 50)
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", size = 0.75),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](index_files/figure-revealjs/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png){width=480}
:::
:::

include-after-body:
<script>
  // htmlwidgets need to know to resize themselves when slides are shown/hidden.
  // Fire the "slideenter" event (handled by htmlwidgets.js) when the current
  // slide changes (different for each slide format).
  (function () {
    // dispatch for htmlwidgets
    function fireSlideEnter() {
      const event = window.document.createEvent("Event");
      event.initEvent("slideenter", true, true);
      window.document.dispatchEvent(event);
    }

    function fireSlideChanged(previousSlide, currentSlide) {
      fireSlideEnter();

      // dispatch for shiny
      if (window.jQuery) {
        if (previousSlide) {
          window.jQuery(previousSlide).trigger("hidden");
        }
        if (currentSlide) {
          window.jQuery(currentSlide).trigger("shown");
        }
      }
    }

    // hookup for slidy
    if (window.w3c_slidy) {
      window.w3c_slidy.add_observer(function (slide_num) {
        // slide_num starts at position 1
        fireSlideChanged(null, w3c_slidy.slides[slide_num - 1]);
      });
    }

  })();
</script>
